heading: Towing vessels
label: 8904 Towing vessels
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource section (U.S. Code)890446:405(b)(2)Section 8904 requires that a 26-foot or larger towing vessel be operated by a licensed individual for that type of vessel and for a particular geographic area.
Amendments2004—Subsec. (c). added subsec. (c).Pub. L. 108–2931986— designated existing provisions as subsec. (a) and added subsec. (b).Pub. L. 99–640

Effective Date of 1986 Amendment, , , provided that:Pub. L. 99–640, § 12(b)100 Stat. 3551Nov. 10, 1986“The amendments made by subsection (a) of this section [amending this section] shall take effect on .”January 1, 1988

Demonstration Project, , , provided that:Pub. L. 108–293, title IV, § 409(b)118 Stat. 1045Aug. 9, 2004“Prior to prescribing regulations under this section [amending this section] the Secretary shall conduct and report to the Congress on the results of a demonstration project involving the implementation of Crew Endurance Management Systems on towing vessels. The report shall include a description of the public and private sector resources needed to enable implementation of Crew Endurance Management Systems on all United States-flag towing vessels.”
amendments: Amendments2004—Subsec. (c). added subsec. (c).Pub. L. 108–2931986— designated existing provisions as subsec. (a) and added subsec. (b).Pub. L. 99–640

L. 108–293, title IV, § 409(b)118 Stat. 1045Aug. 9, 2004“Prior to prescribing regulations under this section [amending this section] the Secretary shall conduct and report to the Congress on the results of a demonstration project involving the implementation of Crew Endurance Management Systems on towing vessels. The report shall include a description of the public and private sector resources needed to enable implementation of Crew Endurance Management Systems on all United States-flag towing vessels.”

children.label: a
children.text: A towing vessel that is at least 26 feet in length measured from end to end over the deck (excluding sheer), shall be operated by an individual licensed by the Secretary to operate that type of vessel in the particular geographic area, under prescribed regulations.

children.label: b
children.text: A vessel that tows a disabled vessel for consideration shall be operated by an individual licensed by the Secretary to operate that type of vessel in the particular geographic area, under prescribed regulations.

children.label: c
children.text: The Secretary may prescribe by regulation requirements for maximum hours of service (including recording and recordkeeping of that service) of individuals engaged on a towing vessel that is at least 26 feet in length measured from end to end over the deck (excluding the sheer).
